title: Croatian Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with lamb and a blend of spices, perfect for a chilly evening. This dish is a twist on the traditional Croatian version, adapted for a vegetarian diet.

ingredients.name: Lamb (substituted with portobello mushrooms)
ingredients.notes: Use a meat substitute or mushrooms for a vegetarian version

ingredients.name: Red wine (substituted with vegetable broth)
ingredients.notes: Use a vegetarian broth for a meat-free version

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the Croatian paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the carrots and potatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the red wine (or vegetable broth) and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley.
